blockers.description: Pre-commit `lockfile-verify` hook fails inside the command sandbox (`bun install --frozen-lockfile` returns PermissionDenied — sandbox blocks install-cache writes)
blockers.workaround: Run `git commit` calls with the command sandbox DISABLED. The lockfile IS in sync; the failure is purely a sandbox restriction. All commits this session used this workaround; the full hook gate (gitleaks + lockfile-verify + lint + typecheck + unit-tests with coverage + commitlint) passes normally. NEVER use --no-verify or LEFTHOOK_EXCLUDE (both forbidden).

Some shipped phases (04, 06, 14 from earlier in the milestone) never had SUMMARY.md files recorded by GSD even though they merged to main. /gsd-progress may mis-route. Trust git log (everything from #688 onward is the source of truth) over the GSD planning artifacts.

decisions.rationale: Repo lints with Biome; no eslint config or deps ever existed. The fictional 11-LINT-RULE.md was describing an ESLint plugin that was never built. Replaced with a Vitest drift-guard test, the project's established CI-gating pattern.

Roadmap asked for ≥3 testimonials; reality ships 2 real attributed testimonials (Janet Shur / 8 properties, Jacob Lear / 13 properties). Fabricating a 3rd would directly violate the v1.0 honesty milestone. The 3rd is deferred until a real customer opts in.

decisions.decision: DEFAULT_NAV_ITEMS upgraded to `as const satisfies readonly NavItem[]` (Phase 12)
decisions.rationale: Canonical TS 4.9+ pattern (verified empirically on TS 6.0 via a probe). Lets the audit test derive a true literal-union NavHref from the nav source so EXPECTED_ACTIVE typos error at typecheck. Required loosening NavbarProps.navItems / NavbarDesktopNavProps.navItems / NavbarMobileMenuProps.navItems from `NavItem[]` → `readonly NavItem[]` (3 consumer prop types). Also required `in`-narrowing on dropdownItems access in 2 test files because `as const` produces a union of element shapes — only items declaring dropdownItems carry that property.

decisions.decision: Phase 13 executed inline rather than via full discuss/plan-check pipeline
decisions.rationale: Tiny scope (1 production line + 1 test file, ~115 insertions). All PERF requirements were already shipped — the deliverable was a 12-test regression pin file + closing the one /about cache-config gap.
